dockerChanges: Base image bumped: node:18-alpine to node:22-alpine in Dockerfile
npm ci to npm install --legacy-peer-deps in Dockerfile (for multer-storage-cloudinary@4 vs cloudinary@2 conflict)

API service: added INTERNAL_SERVICE_TOKEN (required), RAZORPAY_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, JWT_ADMIN_SECRET, PUBLIC_URL, MERCHANT_FRONTEND_URL, CORS_ORIGIN, FCM_SERVER_KEY, GOOGLE_CLOUD_VISION_API_KEY, BBPS_ENABLED, FEATURE_PRIVE_CAMPAIGNS, TRAVEL_WEBHOOK_SECRET, LOG_OTP_FOR_TESTING=false, AUTO_CREATE_INDEXES=false
MongoDB: added MONGO_INITDB_DATABASE, MONGO_INITDB_ROOT_USERNAME; bound to 127.0.0.1; log rotation increased (10m/3 to 50m/10)
Redis: bound to 127.0.0.1; requirepass now mandatory

Added docker-compose.microservices.yml with 8 BullMQ worker services (notification-events, analytics-events, gamification, merchant, catalog, order, wallet, media) plus 3 HTTP API microservices (payment, auth, search)
ELK: xpack.security.enabled=false to true in docker-compose.elk.yml
